overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character exploring the Hufflepuff common room, entering a bedroom to change into pajamas, and returning to the main hall where other students are relaxing. The environment features cozy underground architecture with warm lighting, wooden beams, round doorways, and a large central fireplace.

events.description: character enters the common room through the large round stone archway
character approaches the round doorway leading to the dormitory corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the round entrance arch into the main common room, heading toward the bedroom corridor

entered.detail: large circular stone doorway with intricate carvings framing the entrance
rough-hewn stone walls with warm amber lighting
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the ceiling
wooden balcony railing on the upper level
large stone fireplace with glowing embers in the center of the room
round wooden door with metal studs leading to the dormitory corridor
green leafy plants in pots along the walls
ornate circular rug on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Hufflepuff common room through a grand round archway into a warm, underground space with stone walls and wooden accents. The camera follows as the character walks across the circular rug toward a round doorway on the left, passing potted plants and glimpsing the central fireplace in the distance.

events.description: character enters the narrow corridor with barrel-vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor with barrel vaulted ceiling toward the bedroom

entered.detail: curved stone ceiling creating a tunnel-like effect
smooth stone walls with decorative carved patterns
wall-mounted lanterns casting warm light
long red and gold runner rugs on the floor
stacked wooden barrels against the wall
wooden stand with hanging robes
open doorway leading to the bedroom

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the round doorway into a narrow, barrel-vaulted corridor illuminated by wall sconces. The stone walls are lined with wooden barrels and a coat rack, with long rugs covering the floor. The character walks toward the bedroom doorway at the end of the hall.

events.description: character enters the bedroom from the corridor
character changes clothing from wizard robes to pajamas at the dresser

agents.ego_description: entering the bedroom, approaching the wooden dresser, and changing from dark wizard robes into light-colored pajamas

entered.detail: wooden four-poster beds with draped curtains
large wooden dresser with drawers and a mirror
arched stained glass window depicting a tree design
brass cage with an owl perched on top
small wooden table with a lamp
round clock on the stone wall
green plant in a pot on the dresser
storage chest at the foot of the bed

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy bedroom with stone walls and wooden furniture, including four-poster beds and a large dresser. The character approaches the dresser beneath a stained glass window and changes from wizard robes into pajamas, with an owl cage visible on a bedside table nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: barrel-vaulted corridor returning to common room

events.description: character exits the bedroom back into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward the main common room, now wearing pajamas

entered.detail: curved stone ceiling of the corridor
smooth stone walls with carvings
red and gold runner rugs
stacked wooden barrels

segments.scene_description: Now dressed in pajamas, the character exits the bedroom and walks back through the barrel-vaulted corridor, passing the wooden barrels and wall sconces on the return journey to the main common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hufflepuff common room main hall with fireplace and seating areas

events.description: character re-enters the main common room from the corridor
text 'Winding Down' appears in the lower left corner as other students are seen relaxing
character stops walking and looks around the common room at the other students

agents.ego_description: walking into the main common room and observing other students relaxing by the fireplace and sitting at round tables, now dressed in pajamas

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at a round table near the fireplace, reading a book
student in light-colored robes standing near the bookshelves

entered.detail: round doorway exited from the corridor
massive stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle
plush sofas and armchairs arranged around tables
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books
wooden tables where students are gathered
trailing green plants hanging from the ceiling
wooden balcony on the upper level overlooking the room
decorative tapestries hanging on the stone walls
tall standing lamps with warm shades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into the spacious main common room, now populated with other students sitting at tables and relaxing on sofas near the large central fireplace. The warm glow from the fire and floor lamps illuminates the stone walls, bookshelves, and hanging plants. The character walks through the space, observing the cozy evening atmosphere as other students read and converse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive Hufflepuff common room into a private bedroom and back again, transitioning from a social hub to a quiet sanctuary and returning to a lively evening atmosphere. It begins as the character enters through a grand round archway, moving across a circular rug and past potted plants toward a round doorway on the left. As the character passes through this door, the scene shifts into a narrow, barrel-vaulted corridor lined with wooden barrels and wall sconces before opening into a cozy bedroom where the character changes from wizard robes into pajamas beneath a stained glass window. The camera then tracks the character as they retrace their steps back through the dim corridor, finally emerging once more into the main common room. This return reveals a transformed space now populated with students relaxing by the warm glow of a large central fireplace, surrounded by bookshelves and hanging plants.
